headlines.description: Rayo Vallecano took a huge step in their quest to avoid relegation from LaLiga after a stunning 3-0 win over Champions League-chasing Atlético Madrid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Drop-threatened Vallecano stun Atléti in 3-0 win

video.headline: Atlético Madrid suffer shock defeat to Rayo Vallecano

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Final Game Highlight (Atlético Madrid suffer shock defeat to Rayo Vallecano) 2026/02/15
